TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Gqian_hidaw_Cawcing, title = Gqian_hidaw_Cawcing, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gqian_hidaw_Cawcing} }

S.FORM: = Gqian hidaw Cawcing = Gqian hidaw Cawcing ksun o, ga yeyncenri cungerkaw daya msttuan dxgal hiya, malu bi qtaan ni tduwa qmita knllabang ksiyaw yayung Mtudu, tduwa qtaan rdax gqian hidaw uri ka daya hiya, ida hini suyang bi gqian hidaw Cusan ksun. Cawcingjrwo saan qmita knsyangan hini ga, ida bukuy bnegurah elug cungerkaw do, kika klaan sejiqan da, gbiyan do ida hbaraw bi emptsasing, tna pnhiyuq qyqaya pssaing, pqtaun dha seejiq ka knsyangan nkiya nii.
S.PHON: = gqian ńßidaw ¶aw ¶iŇč = gqian ńßidaw ¶aw ¶iŇč ksun o, ga j…ôn ¶…ôn…ĺi ¶uŇč…ô…ĺkaw daja msttuan dxgal ńßija, malu bi qtaan ni tduwa qmita knllabaŇč ksijaw jajuŇč mtudu, tduwa qtaan …ĺdax gqian ńßidaw u…ĺi ka daja ńßija, ida ńßini sujaŇč bi gqian ńßidaw ¶usan ksun. ¶aw ¶iŇč…ü…ĺwo saan qmita knsjaŇčan ńßini ga, ida bukuj bn…ôgu…ĺańß …ôlug ¶uŇč…ô…ĺkaw do, kika klaan s…ô…üiqan da, gbijan do ida ńßba…ĺaw bi …ômptsasiŇč, tna pnńßijuq qjqaja pssaiŇč, pqtaun dńßa s…ô…ô…üiq ka knsjaŇčan nkija nii.
S.FORM: = Gqian hidaw Cawcing = Gqian hidaw Cawcing ksun o, ga yeyncenri cungerkaw daya msttuan dxgal hiya, malu bi qtaan ni tduwa qmita knllabang ksiyaw yayung Mtudu, tduwa qtaan rdax gqian hidaw uri ka daya hiya, ida hini suyang bi gqian hidaw Cusan ksun. Cawcingjrwo saan qmita knsyangan hini ga, ida bukuy bnegurah elug cungerkaw do, kika klaan sejiqan da, gbiyan do ida hbaraw bi emptsasing, tna pnhiyuq qyqaya pssaing, pqtaun dha seejiq ka knsyangan nkiya nii.
S.PHON: = gqian ńßidaw ¶aw ¶iŇč = gqian ńßidaw ¶aw ¶iŇč ksun o, ga j…ôn ¶…ôn…ĺi ¶uŇč…ô…ĺkaw daja msttuan dxgal ńßija, malu bi qtaan ni tduwa qmita knllabaŇč ksijaw jajuŇč mtudu, tduwa qtaan …ĺdax gqian ńßidaw u…ĺi ka daja ńßija, ida ńßini sujaŇč bi gqian ńßidaw ¶usan ksun. ¶aw ¶iŇč…ü…ĺwo saan qmita knsjaŇčan ńßini ga, ida bukuj bn…ôgu…ĺańß …ôlug ¶uŇč…ô…ĺkaw do, kika klaan s…ô…üiqan da, gbijan do ida ńßba…ĺaw bi …ômptsasiŇč, tna pnńßijuq qjqaja pssaiŇč, pqtaun dńßa s…ô…ô…üiq ka knsjaŇčan nkija nii.
